headline: B. Riley Resets Booking (BKNG) PT after Split; Tigress Financial Raises Target on AI Momentum
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) is included among the 10 Fastest Growing Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On April 10, Naved Khan of B. Riley adjusted the firm’s price recommendation on Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) to $272 from $6,800. It maintained a Buy rating on the shares. The change reflects the company’s 25-to-1 stock split. On […]

headline: Agoda Taipei Deal Highlights Local Push In Booking Holdings Growth Story
summary: Agoda, part of Booking Holdings (NasdaqGS:BKNG), has partnered with the Taipei City government to promote Taipei as a travel destination. The collaboration focuses on digital platform integration, data sharing, skills training, and co-branded marketing to attract more visitors. The partnership strengthens Agoda's ties with local authorities in Asia and deepens Booking Holdings' presence in regional tourism initiatives. For Booking Holdings, which runs a portfolio of online travel brands...
